hero.caption: Zhanna Kolesnik
hero.title: Art producer
hero.description: I connect artists with collectors worldwide — curating exhibitions, managing careers, and building lasting relationships in the art world.

quote.text: Art is not what you see, but what you make others see. My role is to bridge vision and audience.

directions.caption: My
directions.title: areas of work
directions.intro: Art consulting for artists, collectors, and spaces — from strategy through project delivery.
directions.item1Text: Career strategy, positioning, pricing, and venue selection — from intimate shows to international exhibitions.
directions.item2Text: Work selection, texts, visual presentation, and communication with galleries, curators, and institutions.
directions.item3Text: Sourcing works, studio visits, transaction support, and access before public release.
directions.item4Text: Brand and venue collaborations: interiors, live painting at events, masterclasses, and commissions.

about.caption: My name is
about.title: Zhanna Kolesnik
about.paragraph1: I work as an independent producer representing artists across painting, sculpture, and mixed media.
about.paragraph2: I collaborate with galleries, private collectors, and institutions to place works where they resonate most.

artists.caption: For
artists.title: Artists
artists.paragraph1: I build career strategy: positioning, pricing, and the right venues — from intimate to international shows.
artists.paragraph2: I curate exhibitions and strengthen portfolios: work selection, texts, visual presentation, and communication with galleries and curators.
artists.paragraph3: I introduce you to collectors and institutions, lead negotiations, and support sales — so you can focus on making work.
artists.paragraph4: I connect you with projects beyond the traditional gallery: brand and venue collaborations, live painting at openings and events, masterclasses, show formats where guests watch the work unfold, and commissions when the audience experience matters.
artists.imageAlt: Young woman drawing at an easel in a studio

collectors.caption: For
collectors.title: Collectors
collectors.paragraph1: I source works for your collection and taste: painting, sculpture, photography, and mixed media from artists I represent.
collectors.paragraph2: I arrange studio visits, private viewings, and guidance on authentication and provenance.
collectors.paragraph3: I offer access before public release and support the acquisition — from first encounter to delivery.
collectors.paragraph4: I help shape spaces: sourcing and acquiring works for interiors, openings, and private events. I produce artist collaborations — masterclasses, performances, live painting for guests, or bespoke commissions tailored to your brief.
collectors.imageAlt: Contemporary art gallery interior with white walls

taxonomy.title: Categories & authors
taxonomy.subtitle: Labels in English and Russian. IDs are used on artworks — do not remove categories or authors still linked to works.
taxonomy.errorInUse: Cannot remove: category or author is used by an artwork
taxonomy.validationInvalidId: {section}, row {row}: invalid ID "{id}". Use lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. ivan-petrov).
taxonomy.validationPlaceholderId: {section}, row {row}: replace placeholder ID "{id}" — enter a name in English and click outside the field.
taxonomy.validationEmptyEn: {section}, row {row} (ID "{id}"): fill in the English field.
taxonomy.validationEmptyRu: {section}, row {row} (ID "{id}"): fill in the Russian field.

form.imagesHint: Upload multiple images. Select the main cover image.
form.localeHint: Each artwork needs its own title and description in EN and RU. The site does not auto-translate — /ru shows Russian fields, /en shows English. All fields are required.
